title: Outreach Engine
tagline: The 24/7 cold-email pipeline, generalized: 13 module docs, a control panel, and a 149-task roadmap.

title: Leads Cold Call
tagline: Scrape realtors off Google Maps for free, then a call cockpit A/B tests which price closes.

title: Website Builder
tagline: No website? We already built you one. That'll be $50.

title: SendLab

title: AI Cold-Calling Research
tagline: How fast does an AI have to talk before the other end stops hanging up? A research brief.

title: Carly SEO
tagline: SEO console for a wedding photographer whose name must never appear in the rankings it's winning.
